feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sap Scripting with VBA
entry.content: Hey all, I am looking for assistance in automating a specific task in APO using Excel VBA. If anyone can help, please message me.

entry.title: Unable to laod SAP Build Process Automation - In Maintenance Mode message
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When i try to open my SAP Build Process Automation, I'm getting the below attached message.

 

Any idea why i'm getting this? or how much more time it would take? Can i do something to fix this?

I was trying to complete the following tutorial when it started - Create a CAP Service with BAS Productivity Tools and I had completed the setup of SAP Build Apps with Booster when the Maintenance message appeared.

Thanks in advance

Adam

entry.title: Open Excel Instance SAP Build Process Automation on Mac
entry.content:
Hi, 

im trying to open a excel instance in sap build process automation on the MAC. But the functionality is not choosable. Do you have any idea, desktop agent is running and connected. 

Control Tower and Agent are just shown as Windows platform, is there a way to update this to mac on the trial account? 

BR

entry.title: Live Process Import Error
entry.content:
Importing a Live Process Project results in an error without any further information other than asking to raise an incident which I anyway plan to do, checking if anyone else has seen this error and suggest what possibly is going wrong or missing. 

Error: [customui] [ERROR] Deploying in org "dcd43088trial_sk-btp-kpqxpqu9" and space "SPACE"

Live Process Project being added: Project Approval and Release

Once added I am expecting to see this under Lobby but there is nothing visible, also what I have noticed is some service instances getting created under BTP related to this Process.

Thanks

Sreenivas

entry.title: Time out error with Build process automation while running GUI screen recording
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am encountering a few challenges while running SAP GUI screen recording using Build Process Automation.

I created a recording to upload a supporting document for a parked document in FB02, and I am frequently experiencing the following issues:

1. { "retcode": -1, "error": "Error on action SETVALUE -> Access is denied [error UIA00085]." }

2. MyAppli.kill failed: Timeout error: Waiting for application a_uploadXlAutomation to close (120 s).

3. Timeout error: Waiting for screen(s) s_sAP to appear (120 s).

Can someone assist with resolving these issues?

 Thanks & Regards

Pavan

entry.title: Failed to scribe a free SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

Already see the SAP Build Process Automation in Service Marketplace of my trial account for Sep. 12 course preparation. Double Click > Create > Free subscription plan > Failed (twice).

https://cockpit.hanatrial.ondemand.com/trial/#/globalaccount/144e0694-2739-4573-aff6-6ae6f79aa033/subaccount/52546dec-95f5-4614-b67b-b378415a0669/service-marketplace&//detail/c63b63c8-8781-4afb-9d4b-f22d4c7ff76b/?layout=TwoColumnsMidExpanded

Kindly help. Thanks!

BR,

Sylvie

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation + SAP GUI 8 64 Bit
entry.content:
Dear community,

is there a known limitation for SAP Build Process Automation + SAP GUI 8 64 bit ? We are facing an issue that after instaltion of new SAP GUI the old already captured and productive used scenarions are not working anymore. Currently is failing during the load of SAP GUI programm.

THanks

Best regards

DL

entry.title: SAP BPA Process Started but automation not triggered
entry.content:
I have created an automation which reads email from outlook, get body and subject pass it to an AI API which extract info from that body. 

Executing Manually the automation working perfectly fine.


Then I created a process with API Trigger and testing it API trigger following this tutorial
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-run-process-api-trigger.html

My Process:

API is triggered successfull.

In monitoring it shows process running and in logs my automation is also started but nothing is happening like outlook instance open - email search etc.

 

Am i doing anything wrong ? 
Can anyone help , i want to trigger this automation using API.

entry.title: Challenges with Field Extraction in Indian Invoices Using Document Information Extraction
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working on extracting fields from over 100 different templates of Indian invoices using the SAP Document Information Extraction service. However, I am facing challenges in obtaining accurate results across multiple scenarios.

Here are the two approaches I have tried:

Scenario 1:

  • I modified the default SAP invoice schema and added custom fields such as CGST, SGST, IGST (header fields), and HSN, batch number and so on (line items).
  • I created templates for each vendor/different invoice template and trained them using 2-3 sample invoices.

Issues Encountered:

  • Extra line items below the table are being captured as there is no way to declare a footer for the table.
  • Custom fields like CGST rate, CGST value, and HSN are not extracted properly in most cases, especially when there is even a slight difference between the trained template and the input invoice.

Scenario 2:

  • I chose a custom schema and created a list of fields that I needed, such as vendor name, vendor GST, PO number, invoice number and date, CGST, SGST, freight, packaging & forwarding, with the setup type as “auto” for all fields.

Few examples of Issues Encountered:

  • CGST is getting captured even when IGST is present on the invoice.
  • The vendor GST number is being captured as the receiver GST number.
  • Delivery note numbers are being captured as invoice numbers, and material codes are being captured as HSN codes in line items.

When I try to create templates for each invoice under the custom schema and train them, I observe even worse results than before (untrained).

Could anyone help with tackling these issues or suggest a better approach to achieve more accurate results in field extraction?

Thank you!

Best regards,
Koushik

entry.title: Re: SAP Build process Automation - Document Extraction Se...
entry.content:
Hi Julian,

The issue you're facing is likely due to the region selected during the creation of your sub-account. The Document Information Extraction Service is only available in specific regions: Australia (Sydney), Europe (Frankfurt), Europe (Frankfurt) EU Access, Japan (Tokyo), and US East (VA).

If your sub-account was created in a region outside of these supported regions, the service won’t appear when you're trying to use it within the SAP Build Process Automation Service. This is why the "Document Template" and "Extract Data" activities aren't available in your workflow.

To resolve this issue, you may want to check the region where your sub-account is hosted. If it's in an unsupported region, you could create a new sub-account in one of the supported regions and try using the Document Information Extraction Service there.

I hope this helps!

Best regards,
Koushik

entry.title: Loop/Iterate in the SAP Build Process Autoamtion Process flow
entry.content:
I am looking for a way to use loops or iterate calling an action in the process.

I am aware of the looping fucntionality and other conditions available in the automation, but currently I am looking for loops in the Process alone, that way not having to use automation/desktop agent.


Please let me know if the functionality is already present or if there can be any workarounds that I can use.
Thanks in advance

entry.title: AI capabilities in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello "SAP Build"ers,

I am curious to know what are the currently present AI capabilities within SAP Build Process Automation.

For example, while designing & executing a process and decisions etc, are there AI infused content that helps predictive analysis or decision making?

Or are there any other AI-enabled features present in SAP Build Process Automation?

Warm Regards,

Amey

entry.title: SAP BPA - Automation is staying in started mode
entry.content:
I have created a process with API trigger and added an automation to it. 
I'm able to call the API.

 

In monitoring it is showing the process and running but automation is stayed in started mode it is not feteching data or executing any steps in automation.

Although manual execution it is working perfectly fine.

Can anyone help ?

entry.title: Task Center not attributing tasks correctly
entry.content:
I am connecting SAP Build Process Automation My Inbox, and Task Center, in the same subaccount.

I have done the steps from: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/using-same-subaccount

I have configured Task Center with a booster and configured the destinations properly, and it is working, the tasks are being retrieved, but I am not being assigned as an approver to the task.

I already configured Cloud Identity Services, and e-mail as Subject Name Attribute.

I tried to refresh tasks, by removing and adding the property "tc.enabled" from "SAPBuildPA" Destination, and it did not work too.

entry.title: Error - Failed to start outlook, Internal Instance of outlook is null.
entry.content: I am creating a simple automation of outlook using this https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-create-outlook-automation.html#6d46ac9d-1797-4178-808d-8438c019d13b . But i'm getting error "Error - Failed to start outlook, Internal Instance of outlook is null. " when i'm testing the automation.

entry.title: Process Automation: Unattended agent is disconnected automatically
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created an automated process in SAP Build Process Automation. The process is started with a scheduled timer. The process works exactly fine when my computer is active and I can see that the agent is active.

However, when I do not have my computer "active", the agent is automatically put to disconnected. When I go to Monitor > Automated Jobs, I can see that the job is set to "Ready" with the comment "Your job cannot be distributed because no unattended agent is available". Also, if I put the agent to unattended and close my computer, I get the same error because the agent is set to "Disconnected".

Is it possible to let an agent run the process even though your computer is off?

Thanks,

Stefanie

entry.title: How to use Action in a Task automation
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I'm new to Business Process Automation (BPA) and appreciate for any advice on a couple of issues I'm facing:

Background:
I'm working on a project that involves extracting data from Excel and using it to generate a Purchase Requisition Document via an API.

What I've Done So Far:
I've successfully used the necessary API to create and publish an Action (see Figure 1).

The Problems I'm Encountering:

  1. I'm trying to use this Action within a Task automation process, but I'm having trouble locating the option to invoke the Action in the right-hand panel of the screen (as shown in Figure 2). 

  2. Instead within the task automation, I can called a Process, and within that Process, I can invoke the Action. My question is, how do I set the input and output parameters for this Process? (Figure 3)

Any help you can offer would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: I'm facing issue while registering for External Authentication in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: I'm facing issue while registering for External Authentication in SAP Build Process Automation. It returns a Blank screen and registration doesn't complete.

entry.title: SAP Build process automation
entry.content: Hi, I am new to SAP Build process automation. I want to complete the certification in BPA, please guide me how where can I learn everything related to course.

entry.title: Error while calling APIs from Build Process Automation
entry.content:
We are using Build Process Automation on BTP and downloaded the project Inactive Vendor Mark for Blockage or Deletion from the Store and trying to implement it. We have made the required configurations and created destinations, but facing error in Automation to Fetch Finance Document Details, while testing the automation: "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '__count')".  Please suggest.

Gave input as below

Error:

{
    "uid": "bd0d2b28-30f1-4897-a408-c653f4289b40",
    "name": "Automation to Fetch Finance Document Details",
    "type": "automation",
    "instanceUid": "b6f019e3-582e-4393-ba6c-49d257822f1e",
    "packageUid": "5d081521-2d4e-4b5a-88eb-f589fbc396ef",
    "packageVersionUid": "b533a81e-af05-45fd-9896-82b8aac16acb",
    "attended": true,
    "duration": 3,
    "status": "Failed",
    "code": "KO",
    "label": "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '__count')",
    "containerInstanceUid": "b6f019e3-582e-4393-ba6c-49d257822f1e",
    "parentInstanceUid": "8cdba4ef-3d44-28ad-9193-8c4005ccc152",
    "line": 2,
    "file": "bundle.js",
    "exception": "irpa_core.error.Error",
    "stack": "Error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '__count')    at e.error.cast (C:\Users\tbandaru\AppData\Local\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Projects\973e2db6-6d85-4b76-9646-22b67e2a275b\dist\bundle.js:2:208641)    at t.Job.start (C:\Users\tbandaru\AppData\Local\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Projects\973e2db6-6d85-4b76-9646-22b67e2a275b\dist\bundle.js:2:303965)    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)"
}
